message:
test: add regression tests for saveRigTheme RoleThemes preservation (gt-vri31)

Adds tests verifying that saveRigTheme only updates Theme.Name without
clobbering existing RoleThemes map, Custom theme settings, or other
non-theme settings in the RigSettings config file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
